tasks.title: Stabilize homepage advertisement section rendering
tasks.description: Implement and validate sidebar advertisement rendering so .ad-section, .ad-card structure, labels, contact links, and CTA elements pass checks from ads-verification.spec.ts.

tasks.title: Ensure ad links and media are valid and reachable
tasks.description: Audit ad card links and images to ensure tel/mailto formats are valid, CTA links resolve, and ad images are visible and load correctly across supported viewport sizes.

tasks.title: Publish verified article pages and archive integration
tasks.description: Make sure homepage and /archive/ expose integrated article entries, individual article pages render correctly, and article metadata appears in expected locations per article-integration.spec.ts.

tasks.title: Enforce FCC source attribution metadata
tasks.description: Add or repair attribution and verification metadata for integrated articles so FCC-approved source checks and verification expectations pass.

tasks.title: Remove broken internal links across site routes
tasks.description: Crawl internal links and repair 4xx/5xx destinations referenced from homepage, archive, resources, and related pages to satisfy broken-links.spec.ts and production UAT link checks.

tasks.title: Implement JavaScript cache/download verification path
tasks.description: Ensure /m3u8downloader and related scripts load in a cache-observable way, downloaded-js output can be written, and script responses support cache status inspection from cache-js-files.spec.ts.

tasks.title: Expose LangSmith LangGraph demo route
tasks.description: Make sure /demos/langsmith_langgraph_demo/ is reachable on local dev server and returns success status as required by langsmith_langgraph_demo.spec.ts.

tasks.title: Harden Mediasite to m3u8downloader flow
tasks.description: Maintain redirect/navigation flow from Mediasite playback interaction into /m3u8downloader and support selector fallbacks used in mediasite-m3u8.spec.ts.

tasks.title: Pass baseline Jekyll smoke suite
tasks.description: Ensure key pages (/ , /about/, /archive/, /resources/, /news-feeds/) return non-error status, contain body text, and maintain navigation/sitemap expectations from smoke.spec.ts.

tasks.title: Publish production featured articles from important_articles data
tasks.description: Confirm _data/important_articles.json drives featured content rendering and title visibility in production homepage featured section per uat-production.spec.ts.

tasks.title: Emit broken-links.json artifact during UAT
tasks.description: Generate and maintain broken-links.json output for production UAT runs so link failures are actionable and tracked over time.
